commands.review_summary:
The PR changes exec approval followup routing so non-built-in plugin channel sessions forward the original turn-source recipient fields when resuming the agent after approval.

PR surface: Source -12, Tests +24. Total +12 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main can produce an agent followup with `channel` preserved but `to`/`accountId`/`threadId` omitted for an unregistered external plugin channel. I did not run a live external-channel round trip in this read-only review.
